title: Monitoring Committee Notification under ISRWDA under section 6A dated 19/02/1999
description: Monitoring Committee Notification under ISRWDA under section 6A dated 19/02/1999
text: REGD. NO. D. L.-33004/98 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (ii) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 104] NEW DELHI, WEDNESDAY, FEBRUARY 24, 1999/PHALGUNA 5, 1920 MINISTRY OF WATER RESOURCES NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 19th February, 1999 S. O.131(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (5) of section 6A of the Inter-State Water Disputes Act, 1956 (33 of 1956), the Central Government hereby amends the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Water Resources number S. O. 675(E), dated, the 11th August, 1998, namely :- In the said notification, in paragraph 4 relating to the 'MONITORING COMMITTEE', for clause (b) and the entries relating thereto, the following clause and entries shall be substituted namely :— " (b) The Chief Secretary of Karnataka/Kerala/ Tamil Nadu/Union Territory of Pondicherry or his duly nominated representative. Members.'' [F. No. 3/11/98-BM Vol.-III] R. K. PARASHAR, Commissioner (PR) 553 GI/99 Printed by the Manager, Govt of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054 -- 1 of 2 -- -- 2 of 2 --
